texto: I used to size people up to see whether they were a good advert for meditation. Then at some point it clicked that there wasn't a type of person they were going to become. They were each just more and more themselves. Jim was very Jim, Isaac was unique in his Isaac-ness and Debbie was increasingly Debbie. That was a great relief - that I could relax into being Tessa.
explicacao: Citação de Tessa Watt sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I used to size people up to see whether they were a good advert for meditation. Then at some poin…” articula reflexao, mediation, mindfulness em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mindfulness e philosophy.

frase_original: I used to size people up to see whether they were a good advert for meditation. Then at some point it clicked that there wasn't a type of person they were going to become. They were each just more and more themselves. Jim was very Jim, Isaac was unique in his Isaac-ness and Debbie was increasingly Debbie. That was a great relief - that I could relax into being Tessa.
